description: A suspicious host has been identified in the email traffic capture '~/Documents/captures/smtp.pcap'. Identify the Client IP address (the sender of the HELO/EHLO command) and generate firewall rules to deny traffic from this IP. Save a 'Cisco IOS (standard access list)' rule to '~/Documents/cisco_block_rule.txt' and a 'Netfilter (iptables)' rule to '~/Documents/iptables_block_rule.txt'.
